use_cases: Landing page header with animated headline text for marketing sites
SaaS product hero section with rotating feature highlights
Portfolio or personal site intro with animated typography
E-commerce hero with animated promotional text
Dev tools landing page with animated code-related headlines
ai_summary: A premium hero section component featuring animated rotating text with spring-based transitions and scroll-triggered animations. Built with Framer Motion, it includes a custom RotatingText component supporting character/word animations, glow effects, and parallax-style scroll interactions. Perfect for creating engaging landing page headers that capture attention through motion and dynamic typography.
